commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=362cfce88fe451650a451e39dadb553c9684b435)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes native Codex `MEMORY.md` through a workspace-memory pointer when memory tools are detected, keeps bounded prompt fallback without memory tools, updates docs/tests, and adds bootstrap helper exports to `agent-harness-runtime`.

PR surface: Source +119, Tests +146, Docs +11. Total +276 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for the review findings: the PR-head code filters all basename `MEMORY.md` bootstrap files and only detects `memory_search`, while current memory-core and hook code show supported get-only and extra-bootstrap paths. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label, missing real behavior proof, and an unresolved public Plugin SDK surface decision.
